simple_types.name: Case_Selection
simple_types.code: type Case_Selection is (Lower, Mixed, Upper, As_Is);

enumeration_literals.name: As_Is
enumeration_literals.description: Determines the formatting of month names

simple_types.name: Day_Name
simple_types.code: type Day_Name is (Sunday, Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday, Friday, Saturday);

array_types.name: AM_PM_List
array_types.code: type AM_PM_List is array (AM_PM_ID) of Unbounded_String;

array_types.name: Name_List
array_types.code: type Name_List is array (Calendar.Month_Number) of Unbounded_String;

documentation.description: Used to provide month names

constants.name: Default_AM_PM_Name
constants.code: Default_AM_PM_Name : constant AM_PM_List := (AM => To_Unbounded_String (" am"), PM => To_Unbounded_String (" pm") );

constants.name: Default_Long_Name
constants.code:
Default_Long_Name  : constant Name_List := (01 => To_Unbounded_String ("January"),
                                            02 => To_Unbounded_String ("February"),
                                            …
                                            12 => To_Unbounded_String ("December") );

documentation.description: Default "long" month names

constants.name: Default_Short_Name
constants.code:
Default_Short_Name : constant Name_List := (01 => To_Unbounded_String ("Jan"), 02 => To_Unbounded_String ("Feb"),
                                            03 => To_Unbounded_String ("Mar"), 04 => To_Unbounded_String ("Apr"),
                                            …
                                            11 => To_Unbounded_String ("Nov"), 12 => To_Unbounded_String ("Dec") );

documentation.description: Default "short" month names

subprograms.name: Day_Image
subprograms.code: function Day_Image (Day : in Calendar.Day_Number; Zero_Fill : in Boolean := True) return String

documentation.description: Returns the decimal image of Day.

subprograms.name: Day_Of_Week
subprograms.code: function Day_Of_Week (Date : in Calendar.Time) return Day_Name

documentation.description:
These 2 functions provide the day of the week for a given date
Year is interpreted as being in the Common Era

subprograms.name: Day_Of_Week
subprograms.code: function Day_Of_Week (Year : in Positive; Month : in Calendar.Month_Number; Day : in Calendar.Day_Number) return Day_Name

documentation.description:
These 2 functions provide the day of the week for a given date
Year is interpreted as being in the Common Era

subprograms.name: Days_In_Month
subprograms.code: function Days_In_Month (Date : in Calendar.Time) return Calendar.Day_Number

documentation.description:
These 2 functions return the number of days in the given month for the given year
Year is interpreted as being in the Common Era

subprograms.name: Days_In_Month
subprograms.code: function Days_In_Month (Year : in Positive; Month : in Calendar.Month_Number) return Calendar.Day_Number

documentation.description:
These 2 functions return the number of days in the given month for the given year
Year is interpreted as being in the Common Era

subprograms.name: Hour_Image_12
subprograms.code:
function Hour_Image_12 (Hour : in Hour_Number; AM_PM : in AM_PM_List := Default_AM_PM_Name; Zero_Fill : in Boolean := True)
return String

documentation.description:
If Hour = 0, Image is "12". If Hour in 1 .. 12, Image is image of Hour. Otherwise, Image is image of Hour - 12.
If Hour < 12, returns Image & To_String (AM_PM (AM) ). Otherwise, returns Image & To_String (AM_PM (PM) ).
If Zero_Fill, Image will always be 2 characters long. Otherwise, Image will be 1 or 2 characters long.

subprograms.name: Hour_Image_24
subprograms.code: function Hour_Image_24 (Hour : in Hour_Number; Zero_Fill : in Boolean := True) return String

documentation.description: Returns the decimal image of Hour.

subprograms.name: Image
subprograms.code: function Image (Date : in Calendar.Time) return String

documentation.description:
Splits Date into Year, Month, Day, Hour, Minute, and Seconds, then
returns the 23-character string resulting from
   Year_Image_Long (Year)    & ' ' &
   Month_Image_Short (Month) & ' ' &
   Day_Image (Day)           & ' ' &
   Hour_Image_24 (Hour)      & ':' &
   Minute_Image (Minute)     & ':' &
   Seconds_Image (Seconds, Aft => 2);

subprograms.name: Leap_Year
subprograms.code: function Leap_Year (Date : in Calendar.Time) return Boolean

documentation.description:
These 2 functions return True if the given year is a leap year; False otherwise
Year is interpreted as being in the Common Era

subprograms.name: Leap_Year
subprograms.code: function Leap_Year (Year : in Positive) return Boolean

documentation.description:
These 2 functions return True if the given year is a leap year; False otherwise
Year is interpreted as being in the Common Era

subprograms.name: Minute_Image
subprograms.code: function Minute_Image (Minute : in Minute_Number; Zero_Fill : in Boolean := True) return String

documentation.description: Returns the decimal image of Minute.

subprograms.name: Month_Image_Alpha
subprograms.code:
function Month_Image_Alpha (Month : in Calendar.Month_Number; Casing : in Case_Selection := Mixed; Name : in Name_List)
return String

documentation.description: Returns To_String (Name (Month) ), formatted as directed by Casing.

subprograms.name: Month_Image_Long
subprograms.code:
function Month_Image_Long
   (Month : in Calendar.Month_Number; Casing : in Case_Selection := Mixed; Name : in Name_List := Default_Long_Name)
return String

subprograms.name: Month_Image_Numeric
subprograms.code: function Month_Image_Numeric (Month : in Calendar.Month_Number; Zero_Fill : in Boolean := True) return String

documentation.description: Returns the decimal image of Month.

subprograms.name: Month_Image_Short
subprograms.code:
function Month_Image_Short
   (Month : in Calendar.Month_Number; Casing : in Case_Selection := Mixed; Name : in Name_List := Default_Short_Name)
return String

subprograms.name: Seconds_Image
subprograms.code: function Seconds_Image (Seconds : in Minute_Duration; Zero_Fill : in Boolean := True; Aft : in Natural := 0) return String

documentation.description:
Returns the decimal image of Seconds, with Aft digits after the decimal point.
If Aft = 0, result will not contain a decimal point.
If Aft = 0 and Zero_Fill, result will always be 2 characters long.
If Aft = 0 and not Zero_Fill, result will be 1 or 2 characters long.
If Aft > 0 and Zero_Fill, the portion of result left of the decimal point will always be 2 characters long.
Otherwise, the portion of result left of the decimal point may be 1 or 2 characters long.
If Seconds = Minute_Duration'Last, returns the image of 0.0.

subprograms.name: Split
subprograms.code: procedure Split (Seconds : in out Calendar.Day_Duration; Hour : out Hour_Number; Minute : out Minute_Number)

documentation.description: Splits Seconds into Hour, Minute, and Seconds within Minute

subprograms.name: Split

documentation.description: Splits Date using Split to obtain Hour, Minute, and Seconds within Minute

subprograms.name: Year_Image_Long
subprograms.code: function Year_Image_Long  (Year : in Positive; Zero_Fill : in Boolean := True; Width : in Positive := 4) return String

documentation.description:
Returns the decimal image of Year. Result will be large enough to hold this image, or Width characters long,
whichever is larger.

subprograms.name: Year_Image_Short
subprograms.code: function Year_Image_Short (Year : in Positive; Zero_Fill : in Boolean := True) return String

documentation.description: Returns the decimal image of Year rem 100.
